display.purpose: Hero naming and rare signature moments.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Primary reveals and responsive state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The high-contrast studio action used for primary navigation and legal cross-links.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; border:0; border-radius:8px; padding:12px 20px; background:var(--exvia-black, #131313); color:#fff; font:500 14px/1.25 Geist,Arial,sans-serif; transition:background-color 220ms cubic-bezier(.165,.84,.44,1),transform 220ms cubic-bezier(.165,.84,.44,1); } .ds-button-primary:hover { background:#1D1D1D; transform:translateY(-1px); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #4D65FF; outline-offset:3px; } .ds-button-primary:active { transform:translateY(0); }

components.name: App Chip
components.description: An app-specific context marker used on legal documents.
components.css: .ds-app-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; border:1px solid #EFEFF2; border-radius:9999px; padding:6px 12px; background:#fff; color:#1D1D1D; font:500 12px/1.5 GeistMono,monospace; letter-spacing:.1em; } .ds-app-dot { width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:#0082F3; }

components.name: Sticky Navigation
components.description: A compact studio bar that becomes a readable white layer over content.
components.html: Snaxx TechBack to home
components.css: .ds-nav { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; min-height:64px; padding:0 24px; border-bottom:1px solid #EFEFF2; background:rgba(255,255,255,.92); color:#131313; font-family:Geist,Arial,sans-serif; } .ds-nav a { color:inherit; text-decoration:none; padding:12px 0; } .ds-nav a:hover { color:#0082F3; } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #4D65FF; outline-offset:3px; border-radius:4px; }

narrative.overview: A dark cinematic studio atmosphere, real product imagery, and crisp product accents create a memorable independent-maker voice without compromising release-ready clarity.

rules.name: The Product Signal Rule
rules.body: Use a product accent to identify its product, not as interchangeable decoration.

rules.name: The Readable Document Rule
rules.body: Legal and support copy uses generous body leading and a 65–75ch measure.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces remain flat until hierarchy or interaction requires separation.

dos: Keep product accents attached to their product.
Preserve keyboard focus and reduced-motion behavior.
donts: Don't use generic agency-template card grids.
Don't use childish gimmicks or motion overload.
